title: Origin Realms - Emissive
description: Emissive texture support for Origin Realms.
body:
## Description:
**Origin Realms - Emissive** is a resource pack designed to add **emissive texture support** with shaders on Origin Realms.

### Requirements:
It works with both **Optifine** and **Iris**, so please install the necessary dependencies.

This pack does **not** reuquire **Server Pack Unlocker.**

## FAQ:
<details>
<summary>Do I need shaders to use?</summary>

Yes, you need to use this pack with shaders that support the **LabPBR** Format.

I personally use the Reimagined shaders for all my images.
Some Recommended shaders are:
- Reimagined
- Complementary
- BSL

You can more of the supported shaders [here.](https://wiki.shaderlabs.org/wiki/LabPBR_Supported_Packs)

</details>

<details>
<summary>How do I use this?</summary>
  
  Simply drop this pack in the _resourcepacks_ folder, and apply a shader of choice.
  
  Next up hit **F3 + O** or open the shader settings.
  
  Toggle the RP Support to **LabPBR.**
  
</details>

For any bug reports and feedback, you can contact me on **Origin Realms discord**. 

![Image](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/822719933590798347/1195046860767887471/2023-11-29_18.31.01.png?ex=65b2911e&is=65a01c1e&hm=76b2a02853451710c590120a2c86efff0601d94ad5b8c382ae1822adc8143592&)
